# Test ledger

The **generated** 3-bucket punch-list of what is turned off, opted out, and
non-gating across the test suites. Counts are a pure function of the committed
source tree, so they cannot go stale. Prose + roadmap: `docs/testing/README.md`.

| Bucket | What | Count |
| --- | --- | ---: |
| 1 | HARD SKIPS / QUARANTINES (backlog ‚Üí drive to 0) | 6 |
| 2 | COVERAGE EXEMPTIONS (deliberate auto-enrollment opt-outs) | 512 |
| 3 | INFORMATIONAL-ONLY CI LANES (run, never block merge) | 5 |

## CI gating truth (from `.github/workflows/ci.yml`)

Required status-check **contexts** (2 ‚Äî branch ruleset 16042163; not in-repo,
see `.claude/skills/pr-workflow.md`):
- `typecheck + unit + ART + E2E`  (ci.yml:2076)
- `vrt-strict (visual regression ‚Äî strict subset)`  (ci.yml:2504)

Jobs gated THROUGH the `ci` umbrella (a failure of any blocks merge) ‚Äî 11:
- `actionlint`, `art`, `behavioral-smoke`, `build`, `build-web`, `dsp-build`, `e2e`, `typecheck`, `unit`, `webgl-attest`, `webgl-smoke`

## Bucket 1 ‚Äî hard skips / quarantines (6)

Every declaration-level test disable + the spawn-smoke quarantine map. Each is
BACKLOG: reconcile by fixing (assert real behavior) or deleting (worthless) ‚Äî
there is no permanent "intentional / correct-by-design" bucket. In-body runtime
guards (`test.skip(cond, ‚Ä¶)`) are env gates, not disables, and are excluded.

- `packages/web/src/lib/audio/modules/treeohvox-parity.test.ts:29` ‚Äî describe.skip ‚Äî Open303 binary parity (run manually)

- `e2e/tests/recorderbox.spec.ts:491` ‚Äî test.fixme ‚Äî RECORDERBOX records a real VCO + ACIDWARP into a crash-recoverable MP4

_none_

## Bucket 2 ‚Äî coverage exemptions (512)

Declarative auto-enrollment opt-out lists. A module opted out of a UNIVERSAL
sweep still carries dedicated coverage (a bespoke spec / unit core / ART). These
are DELIBERATE ‚Äî but per repo doctrine the **behavioral** exemptions are ALSO
tracked-to-zero backlog (reconcile = fix or delete); see the roadmap.

- `swolevco.timbre` ‚Äî waveform-shape CV: subtle shift below centroid threshold

- `synesthesia.b_in` ‚Äî copy B is independent
- `synesthesia.b_video_in` ‚Äî video input is consumed card-side ONLY in VIDEO mode (b_mode=1)
- `tempest.rim` ‚Äî claw occupies ~1 of 16 lanes

### `SKIP_SPAWN` (2) ‚Äî modules skipped from the per-module-per-port spawn (handle/emit/drive) sweep

### `EXEMPT_OUTPUT_EMIT_MODULES` (40) ‚Äî whole-module output-emit exemptions (asset/ROM/press-driven)
<sub>e2e/tests/per-module-per-port.spec.ts</sub>
- `archivist` ‚Äî all outputs (image/video/audio/gates/playhead) are idle until an archive.org item loads (external network)
- `audioIn` ‚Äî requires live mic input
- `blood` ‚Äî all outputs need user-supplied, non-redistributable Blood data (BLOOD.RFF/GUI.RFF/SOUNDS.RFF, gitignored, absent in C‚Ä¶
- `bluebox` ‚Äî silent until a button is pressed
- `cvBuddy` ‚Äî passthrough note outputs (silent until inputs driven) + owner-only run/clock that need a running TIMELORDE transport
- `drumseqz` ‚Äî requires toggled steps
- `es9` ‚Äî all outputs source from physical ES-9 hardware via the native bridge (absent in CI)
- `fader` ‚Äî video mixer
- `featurecv` ‚Äî outputs are input-conditional (broadband RMS/ZCR/crest CV + flux onset, silent until `in` is driven)
- `flipper` ‚Äî gate flip-flop
- `gamepad` ‚Äî no gamepad attached in test browser
- `illogic` ‚Äî boolean logic on inputs
- `joystick` ‚Äî no joystick movement in test browser
- `macseq` ‚Äî requires toggled steps
- `marbles` ‚Äî requires UI-enabled internal clock
- `midiCvBuddy` ‚Äî requires MIDI device
- `midiOutBuddy` ‚Äî no audio/CV outputs (emits MIDI to external gear)
- `midiclock` ‚Äî clock/midistop pulses are sub-frame gates
- `milkdrop` ‚Äî video out needs the async preset chunk loaded + butterchurn warmup before it emits, exceeding the generic emit window
- `modtris` ‚Äî line_cleared/overfill only fire after ~10 piece drops
- `moog911a` ‚Äî trigger-delay
- `moog956` ‚Äî ribbon controller
- `moog962` ‚Äî sequential switch
- `moog992` ‚Äî passive CV summer/attenuator
- `moog993` ‚Äî passive trigger/envelope router
- `numpadPlus` ‚Äî driver page.evaluate hangs under CI load (8 outputs √ó 20s exceeds budget)
- `peertube` ‚Äî needs a resolved + attached PeerTube stream for any output
- `polyseqz` ‚Äî requires toggled steps
- `pong` ‚Äî score_left/score_right only fire on ball-miss after bounces
- `samsloop` ‚Äî needs a decoded sample buffer AND a trigger to emit (idle-by-default, no autoplay)
- `score` ‚Äî requires play_cv high + steps
- `sequencer` ‚Äî requires user-toggled step.on=true
- `slewSwitch` ‚Äî driver setup hangs in CI (7 outputs √ó 20s exceeds budget)
- `synesthesia` ‚Äî outputs are input-conditional (band audio/env/gate)
- `timelorde` ‚Äî clock divider
- `tvLibrarian` ‚Äî needs a live tuned HLS stream for any output
- `twotracks` ‚Äî needs a recorded buffer to emit (idle until first record pass)
- `videobox` ‚Äî needs decoded video file (Web Codecs pipeline)
- `videocube` ‚Äî video isomorph of audio CUBE with 8 outputs (video_out + audio drone + 6 per-port-gated slice-viz jacks)
- `videovarispeed` ‚Äî needs decoded video file + varispeed scrubber

- `doom.evt_kill_lostsoul` ‚Äî requires in-game lost-soul kill

- `doom.evt_kill_shotguy` ‚Äî requires in-game shotgunner kill
- `doom.evt_kill_spectre` ‚Äî requires in-game spectre kill

- `doom.evt_kill_wolfss` ‚Äî requires in-game wolf SS kill (DOOM II only)
- `doom.evt_kill_zombieman` ‚Äî requires in-game zombieman kill

- `doom.evt_p2_dies` ‚Äî requires in-game P2 death
- `doom.evt_p3_dies` ‚Äî requires in-game P3 death
- `doom.evt_p4_dies` ‚Äî requires in-game P4 death
- `doom.out` ‚Äî WASM render loop > sweep budget
- `gibribbon.evt_fire` ‚Äî fires only when the marine fires on an enemy clear
- `gibribbon.evt_gameover` ‚Äî fires only on GAME OVER
- `gibribbon.evt_hit` ‚Äî fires only on an in-game clear
- `gibribbon.evt_kill` ‚Äî fires only on an enemy death
- `gibribbon.evt_miss` ‚Äî fires only on an in-game miss
- `gibribbon.health_cv` ‚Äî idle DC (healthy=0.75) is constant + AC-coupled below the scope floor
- `illogic.and` ‚Äî AND fires only when in1 AND in2 both > 0.5
- `illogic.nand` ‚Äî NAND inverse of AND
- `illogic.not` ‚Äî NOT inverse of in1>0.5
- `illogic.or` ‚Äî OR fires often but its complement NOT may miss
- `mandelbulb.audio_out` ‚Äî silent until the SLICE toggle is ON (default off)
- `midiLane.note_gate` ‚Äî single ~6 ms one-shot pulse below the scope poll resolution (like midiclock sub-frame gates)
- `midiLane.poly` ‚Äî poly is always live (#674) but a poly‚ÜíSCOPE edge reads lane-0 PITCH (steady DC, AC-scope can\'t peak it)
- `moogCp3.minus_six` ‚Äî constant ‚àí6V DC reference rail
- `moogCp3.plus_twelve` ‚Äî constant +12V DC reference rail
- `nibbles.death` ‚Äî requires in-game death event
- `nibbles.dir_change` ‚Äî requires in-game direction change
- `nibbles.gated` ‚Äî requires in-game pellet event to open internal VCA
- `nibbles.length_cv` ‚Äî idle DC value ‚âà-0.93 is constant + within scope noise floor
- `nibbles.pellet` ‚Äî requires in-game pellet-eaten event
- `outlines.mapped` ‚Äî doubly input-conditional (video input AND a ‚â•2-overlap region within the window)
- `sixstrum.out` ‚Äî plucked-string voice, silent-until-struck
- `skifree.gate` ‚Äî fires only on in-game crash/eaten event
- `skifree.out` ‚Äî animated game canvas (rAF self-driven, no still frame)
- `timelorde.1/12` ‚Äî period 2.4 s @ test BPM 300
- `timelorde.1/16` ‚Äî period 3.2 s @ test BPM 300
- `timelorde.1/32` ‚Äî period 6.4 s @ test BPM 300
- `timelorde.1/64` ‚Äî period 12.8 s @ test BPM 300
- `timelorde.1/8` ‚Äî period 1.6 s @ test BPM 300

### Opt-IN completeness ratchets (the more members the better)

- `STRICT_DOCS`: **184** ‚Äî modules held to the FULL living-docs completeness bar (deny-missing-docs) <sub>(packages/web/src/lib/docs/strict-docs.ts)</sub>
- `STRICT_VRT_MODULES`: **48** ‚Äî modules whose card MUST ship a VRT baseline (deny-missing-baseline) <sub>(e2e/vrt/vrt-exemptions.ts)</sub>

## Bucket 3 ‚Äî informational-only CI lanes (5)

Jobs that RUN on a PR but never block merge. Red here is a signal to inspect,
not a merge blocker.

- `behavioral-coverage`  (ci.yml:1123) ‚Äî continue-on-error: true
- `collab`  (ci.yml:898) ‚Äî umbrella aggregate step labels it informational
- `collab-attest`  (ci.yml:1893) ‚Äî in umbrella needs+env but absent from the failing `if` (waited-on, non-blocking)
- `grand-attest`  (ci.yml:1950) ‚Äî in umbrella needs+env but absent from the failing `if` (waited-on, non-blocking)
- `vrt`  (ci.yml:2239) ‚Äî continue-on-error: true
